name: Tailored CV Generator - HTML Source + Claude + Save to Disk

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.anthropic_model, max_tokens: 8000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.anthropic_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, profile: $json.profile, requested_at: $json.requested_at, saved_file: $json.output_file_path, file_name: $json.output_file_name, cv_html: $json.generated_cv_html } }}
